secrets.name: sap-url
secrets.description: SAP SOAP Web Service URL (WSDL endpoint for ZmfTestService)

secrets.name: sap-username
secrets.description: SAP service account username for SOAP authentication

secrets.name: sap-password
secrets.description: SAP service account password for SOAP authentication

secrets.name: test-adls-storage-key
secrets.description: ADLS Gen2 storage account access key for Databricks fs.azure.account.key configuration

secrets.name: test-sql-connection-string
secrets.description: Azure SQL connection string for BD_TEST database used by Databricks notebooks via pyodbc

secrets.name: sharepoint-client-id
secrets.description: SharePoint/Azure AD application client ID for accessing SharePoint files via Microsoft Graph API

secrets.name: sharepoint-tenant-id
secrets.description: Azure Active Directory tenant ID for Test organization

notes: All secrets must be created in the Key Vault before running any ADF pipeline or Databricks notebook.
Databricks secret scope 'kv-test' must be backed by the environment Key Vault.
Azure Functions reference secrets via Key Vault references in App Settings (format: @Microsoft.KeyVault(SecretUri=...)).
Rotate sap-password and sharepoint-client-secret every 90 days per security policy.
